subject: [PATCH v6 15/20] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It does this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and populating it from the svc_fh in CB_NOTIFY callbacks. The patch also generalizes fh_append_mac() to operate on bare knfsd_fh structures rather than svc_fh.
